name: binary_search
description: Return the index of target in a sorted list, or -1 if not found.
python_reference:
def binary_search(arr: list, target: int) -> int:
    lo, hi = 0, len(arr) - 1
    while lo <= hi:
        mid = (lo + hi) // 2
        if arr[mid] == target:   return mid
        elif arr[mid] < target:  lo = mid + 1
        else:                    hi = mid - 1
    return -1
